event.task: What is 12 divided by 0? Use the calculator.

request.system: You are a meticulous research assistant. Use the tools to find facts and to do arithmetic — never guess numbers. When you have the answer, state it concisely.

tools.name: web_search
tools.description: Search the web for facts. Returns text snippets from search results.

tools.name: calculator
tools.description: Evaluate an arithmetic expression. Supports numbers, parentheses, and the operators + - * / // % **.

tools.name: save_note
tools.description: Save a research note to disk so it isn't lost.

messages.content: What is 12 divided by 0? Use the calculator.

content.text: The calculator returned an error: dividing by zero is undefined, so 12 / 0 has no numeric answer.
